name: Hemi Group LLC v. City of New York
question: Does the City of New York meet the RICO "causation" requirements in its suit against out-of-state cigarette vendors that the plaintiff be directly injured in its "business or property" when the City merely alleges an injury from the nonpayment of taxes by non-litigant third-parties?
description: A case in which the Court held that the city of New York had standing to sue out-of-state cigarette vendors under the Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations Act.
